notes: Two-view silhouettes roughly track the input photo's dorsal and lateral squid layout but arms are merged into clumpy blobs with photo-trace clutter and no clean ring suckers.
specific_issues: arms fused into broad blobs rather than discrete tapered limbs
no ring suckers — tentacle clubs unreadable
eye on dorsal view missing; lateral eye is a tiny scribble rather than an almond with pupil
photo-trace noise: short broken edge fragments inside the body instead of clean contours
stipple is patchy and concentrated in wrong fields (mid-mantle band) rather than tracking the photo's chromatophore distribution
fin outline on dorsal view is plausible but lateral view fin is a thin sliver and broken
no head-mantle junction line / nuchal detail
extra small spur shapes on tentacle tips that don't correspond to the photo
overall reads like a noisy auto-traced edge map rather than an FAO plate
